name: Monia | Castaways | Nightmare Paradise Island | Horror
description:
Scenario I - Castaways

Main Theme - Broken Compass

"Did someone ever tell you what the definition of insanity is?"

Content Warning: It may not be anything extreme, but Monia's intro mentions her cutting up corpses with a knife.

As you could read here - CLICK - I was supposed to publish Monia earlier, but when Nariku was about to send me all the finished images, her internet decided to stop working, and it took Nariku over a week to fix everything. Of course, as always, thank you so much for the images you generated for me. Monia looks wonderful.

LOREBOOK: Yes, the lorebooks are finally here. This means I can start creating lorebooks for Overgrowth and Mechamorphosis. I wrote more about these two series here - CLICK. Initially, I'll focus on creating the lorebook for Overgrowth, but I can't say when I'll finish it. However, I will tell you that I have more plans for story bots, in which you will be able to influence the development of the stories presented in them.

Mechamorphosis will be harder because I have about a few hundred pages to look through and create a lorebook based on this information

How am I doing? Everything is fine. I've started my final year of my medical program at uni, so I have a lot of studying and nerve-wracking ahead of me. Because of this, I might post my bots a little less often, but I'll try to be more consistent (because I enjoy creating bots).

IMAGES: From now on, in addition to Nariku, another person will "work" for me and create images for my bots. I also plan to finally use my second account, where I want to post more casual characters.

That's all from me! Stay warm, I love you all, and thank you for your support. Mwaaah!

If you'd like to meet new people, share your work, or are interested in what I'm creating and want to know in advance what my next bot will be and when I'll release it, I cordially invite you to join my Discord server. We're a really nice, friendly, and supportive group that brings together both users and creators on this platform. You can also get help here if you encounter any problems with my bots! :3
I share this server with Nariku and <
creator: Kikuro
